title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 210.106 - Failure to use passenger restraint system not to be basis for civil actions — evidence inadmissible
text:
210.106.  Failure to use passenger restraint system not to be basis for civil actions — evidence inadmissible. — In no event shall failure to employ a child passenger restraint system required by section 307.179 provide the basis for a claim of civil liability or negligence or contributory negligence of any person in any action for damages by reason of injury sustained by a child; nor shall such failure to employ such child passenger restraint system be admissible as evidence in the trial of any civil action.
(L. 1983 H.B. 29 § 2, A.L. 1993 S.B. 394, A.L. 2006 S.B. 872, et al.)
